text:
In the quiet of the first space, I am met with an undercurrent of uncertainty—caught between stillness and anticipation. Someone's repeated assurance of return echoes off the clean walls and soft surfaces, mingling with a sense of incompletion and paused effort. A strange calm pervades, though it teeters on the edge of anxiety—there is time here for reflection, for patience.

Moving into the next room, the R+D display pulls me into an atmosphere of curiosity and restless energy. This place is alive with color and intention, a hub for thought and innovation. The text on the screen alludes to detachment but also possibility—here, the mind may wander, explore, connect ideas between the human and the mechanical. The contrast between these two rooms makes me feel suspended—in one, waiting; in the other, ready to wonder. I feel contemplative, open, and quietly electric.
